issue.title: Filter question
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard for Windows

### AdGuard version

Latest

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Chrome

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://lifetimeofwellbeing.com

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

AdGuard URL Tracking filter

### Social Widgets

AdGuard Social Media filter

### Annoyances

AdGuard Annoyances filter

### Security

Online Malicious URL Blocklist

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

AdGuard DNS filter

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

An issue I seem to be challenged with is allowing the help beacon on my own websites. I have a few filters setup for this but they don't seem to work. Hoping you all can help me out. With adGuard turned on, I see this in the console.

Navigated to https://lifetimeofwellbeing.com/insights/
jquery-migrate.min.js:2 JQMIGRATE: Migrate is installed, version 3.4.1
insights/:640 animation has been set up
hsd-beacon.js:1  GET https://beacon-v2.helpscout.net/ net::ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED
a @ hsd-beacon.js:1

The beacons show up when it's disabled and no errors in console.

Here are the two filters I have in place.

@@||hsd-beacon.js^$important,script
@@||[beacon-v2.helpscout.net](http://beacon-v2.helpscout.net/)^$important,document

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

issue.title: Filter question
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard for Windows

### AdGuard version

Latest

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Chrome

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://lifetimeofwellbeing.com

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

AdGuard URL Tracking filter

### Social Widgets

AdGuard Social Media filter

### Annoyances

AdGuard Annoyances filter

### Security

Online Malicious URL Blocklist

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

AdGuard DNS filter

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

An issue I seem to be challenged with is allowing the help beacon on my own websites. I have a few filters setup for this but they don't seem to work. Hoping you all can help me out. With adGuard turned on, I see this in the console.

Navigated to https://lifetimeofwellbeing.com/insights/
jquery-migrate.min.js:2 JQMIGRATE: Migrate is installed, version 3.4.1
insights/:640 animation has been set up
hsd-beacon.js:1  GET https://beacon-v2.helpscout.net/ net::ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED
a @ hsd-beacon.js:1

The beacons show up when it's disabled and no errors in console.

Here are the two filters I have in place.

@@||hsd-beacon.js^$important,script
@@||[beacon-v2.helpscout.net](http://beacon-v2.helpscout.net/)^$important,document

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body:
If you only need it unblocked for that site, this might be a better option:
`@@||beacon-v2.helpscout.net^$script,domain=lifetimeofwellbeing.com`

This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

Please also check this one. > > chatgpt.com##div[class]:has(> button[class] > span.text-nowrap > svg.icon-sm > use[href="/cdn/assets/sprites-core-**fxfgsfqf.svg#d3876b**"]) Looks that they've generated new IDs by slamming a keyboard on the desk. `
`

issue.title: screenrant.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://screenrant.com/the-lincoln-lawyer-movie-show-hayley-haller/?link_source=ta_first_comment&taid=69d9bdea82762a0001ae3216&utm_campaign=TrueAnthem-SR&utm_medium=Social-Distribution&utm_source=Facebook&fbclid=IwY2xjawRG9IZleHRuA2FlbQIxMABzcnRjBmFwcF9pZBAyMjIwMzkxNzg4MjAwODkyAAEe4K9Q1zC_wzScOUZy1W9IYgP4Mj-F61huepmj8NDcNBQA0eWpDPy9lCEi6U0_aem_X6BWAkRXhRDPHu96mvvVMQ](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fscreenrant.com%2Fthe-lincoln-lawyer-movie-show-hayley-haller%2F%3Flink_source%3Dta_first_comment%26taid%3D69d9bdea82762a0001ae3216%26utm_campaign%3DTrueAnthem-SR%26utm_medium%3DSocial-Distribution%26utm_source%3DFacebook%26fbclid%3DIwY2xjawRG9IZleHRuA2FlbQIxMABzcnRjBmFwcF9pZBAyMjIwMzkxNzg4MjAwODkyAAEe4K9Q1zC_wzScOUZy1W9IYgP4Mj-F61huepmj8NDcNBQA0eWpDPy9lCEi6U0_aem_X6BWAkRXhRDPHu96mvvVMQ) ### Comment > Leider habe ich das Problem, dass ich die Videos, die zu dem jeweiligen Artikel, eingebettet sind, nicht mehr sehe. Ich hatte das Problem früher mit der Chrome-Extension schon, dort konnte ich den spezifischen Filter aber für die Seite deaktivieren und alles war ok. Leider gibt es diese detaillierte Option in der Desktop-Version nicht mehr. Die einzige Möglichkeit das Video zu sehen ist, wenn ich den DNS-Schutz deaktiviere, was nicht zielführend ist. Auch ein umstellen auf Google oder adguard DNS hat nicht geholfen, das Video bleib geblockt. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/mqio4etbaysgkgg8o4cko0c8kcwso8w2d0mgqzl7ad.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/1qmrbbiplrpcswcs008k8cgg80444k4s3y55wuu6a8.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Windows v7.22.6 (5267) System version: | `Microsoft Windows NT 10.0.19045.0` Browser: | Chrome License type: | free Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

**Social Widgets:**
AdGuard Social Media filter

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter,
AdGuard Widgets filter

**Language-specific:**

issue.title: spankbang.com (NSFW)
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard for Android

### AdGuard version

*

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Missed analytics or tracker

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Brave

### Which device do you use?

Mobile

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://spankbang.com/a4c5m/video/redhead+samantha+sinz+jerks+me+off+at+sweetfemdom

comment.body:
> [@jo2dan94](https://github.com/jo2dan94) Looks like it is caused by `Hide your search queries`. This should fix it `@@||supercachecdn.com/play/*.mp4?token=$media,stealth=referrer`.

that works perfectly! thankyou!

comment.body:
> * i want to use less no of wildcard in any rule if possible
> * i only know of this domain `pornammo.com` where breakage occurs hence used **$domain**, if you provide other domains ,i can remove **$domain** modifier

I understand your preference for more specific rules. I was asking why you did not add the domain to your existing rule.

Example:
```
! https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/228933
! https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/227523
@@||supercachecdn.com/play/$media,stealth=referrer,domain=pornmedium.com|pornammo.com

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).
